name: Froot - Goth Best Friend
description:
"I love your Soul, mind if I borrow it??" Froot, your very lovable V-tuber best friend who wants to cuddle.

[This was created before I knew what happened, I apologize for the upload.]

This is my 1/4 special bots to celebrate 50 followers!! :)) wow I made this account in the beginning of February and we're halfway to 100 followers, in the span of 3 weeks!! I'll try my best to upload more high quality bots for you guys to enjoy and thank you, user. This is 1/4 of bots from my celebration series, Apricot The Lich. and I figured this is a vtuber after I made this lol.

ONCE AGAIN. I made this a while ago so it's. unfortunate to hear all the rumors about her☹️
